notes: Gmail action endpoints: archive, delete (trash), star/unstar, mark read/unread, labels list, compose, attachment download.
TUI actions wired in Gmail context with single-key bindings (a/d/s/r/u/c/l/t).
Compose flow opens overlay, sends via /messages/compose.
Attachments extracted from payload walker in services._extract_attachments; download endpoint returns binary.
Tests in tests/test_gmail_actions.py cover all service functions + server endpoints.
